name: GREED

abilities.name: Don't Turn Your Back:
abilities.text: Enemy models that activate engaged with this model may not declare the Interact action until the end of their activation.

abilities.name: Take What is Mine:
abilities.text: Once per activation. After an enemy model within 6" drains a (soulstone), this model infuses a (soulstone).

triggers.name: Rest in Peace
triggers.text: Target must have a Craven or Summon token. When resolving, this action deals +3 damage.

triggers.name: Siphon Life
triggers.text: When resolving, this action deals +1 damage and this model heals 1.

actions.name: Unchecked Avarice
actions.costs_and_restrictions: Once per activation. The target chooses a number from 1-3.
actions.effects: Reveal a number of cards from the target's deck equal to the chosen number. The target is dealt 2 damage for each non-(c) card revealed this way and then draws the revealed cards.

triggers.name: I Always Get Mine
triggers.text: This model draws a number of cards equal to the cards the target drew.

actions.name: Turn a Profit
actions.costs_and_restrictions: Target an enemy marker. Once per activation.
actions.effects: Place this model in base contact with the target, remove the target, and draw a card.

triggers.name: Protect My Own
triggers.text: This model and friendly models with (i)3" gain a Shielded token.

extraction_notes: The italic '(i)3"' notation in 'Protect My Own' trigger appears to be shorthand for 'within 3 inches' - rendered as '(i)3"' to preserve exact formatting
